data.body:
[Blue Archive Twitch Live Streaming Drops Event (BETA)]

A live streaming Drops Event (BETA) is now underway on Twitch!
During the event, don’t forget to link your account first, watch Blue Archive streams on Twitch, and complete the missions to earn a variety of rewards~

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3191134

#BlueArchive #Twitch 
\* Campaign schedule is subject to change.

![G31pcV9XMAEEEco.jpeg](https://kivo.wiki/files/153/UVfDMAutt7iZGLrgpge6WWe7cYpaC4w9.jpg)
